particulars.description: The chargor charges by way of first legal mortgage all its rights, title and interest in and to the property known as 83 avenue road, london, NW8 6JD with title number NGL807993. The chargor charges by way of first fixed charge all its right, title and interest in and to: all other interests and estates in any real property (as defined in the instrument) not otherwise effectively mortgaged and any intellectual property.

persons_entitled.name: Union Bancaire Privee, Ubp Sa (London Branch)
